component.name: OneUp
component.summary: Update openSUSE packages, Flatpaks and firmware from one window

description.p: OneUp is a one-click update dashboard for openSUSE (Tumbleweed and Leap). It wraps the correct command-line update steps behind a simple panel, so you do not have to remember them or juggle several tools:

ul.li: System packages — zypper dup --allow-vendor-change on Tumbleweed, zypper update on Leap
Flatpak apps — user and system scope, with unused runtimes pruned
Housekeeping — a safe clean-up of leftover dependency packages and the download cache

description.p: Each step is a toggle, so you choose what runs. OneUp itself never runs as root — it asks for your password once through the desktop's standard prompt and streams a live log of everything it does.

screenshot.caption: The OneUp panel with all update tasks toggled on
